task.name: Combat System Core Implementation
task.description: Implement core combat system with damage calculation, basic attack processing, and equipment bonuses

context.project: muh5 - Mu Đại Thiên Sứ H5 Game

participants.rationale: Architecture aligns with existing service pattern. Damage formula is simple and extensible. Equipment bonuses additive to base attack stat. Integration with CharacterService is clean.
key_recommendations: Equipment bonuses: Additive to base attack stat

participants.rationale: Validation requirements met for Req 3.2 and 18.1. Server-authoritative design prevents client manipulation. Minimum damage (1) prevents zero damage exploits.
key_recommendations: Edge cases: zero/negative damage, missing equipment, invalid targets

participants.rationale: Implementation feasible within existing codebase structure. TypeScript interfaces straightforward. Equipment bonus retrieval from character data is clean. No blocking dependencies.

decision.rationale: Strong team consensus (95.1%) exceeds threshold. All agents approve with high confidence. Architecture aligns with existing patterns, requirements validated, implementation feasible.

implementation_approach.testing: Unit tests + property-based tests + integration tests

next_steps: Developer implements CombatService following approved approach
